problem id: 302dc36e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  01110111 -> 11110011
  11001000 -> 10100010
  01100100 -> 11010001
  11101110 -> 11100111
  10110000 -> 01001100
  11110100 -> 11010101
  00010010 -> 00100000
  00100011 -> 01001110
  10101001 -> 01111000
  00100000 -> 01001000

query: 00000110
predicted answer: 00001101
